phase_progress: Phase 9 executing: 6/10 changes DONE. C-006 (reload re-resolve) landed: config_reload re-runs seed → overlay → reload_mcp_servers after reload_config so a reload never reverts a DB runtime value to the config.toml bootstrap. seed/overlay widened to &dyn KernelApi so the handler (Arc<dyn KernelApi>) can call them. Boot AND reload pipelines are now DB-authoritative + UI-edit-safe. Next C-007 (determinism: ORDER BY + regression test mirroring mcp_summary_*) -> C-005b -> C-008 -> C-009 (C-009 hard-gated on C-008 prod verify).

next_action.description: Determinism: confirm config_store list() ORDER BY key + a regression test that the MCP summary is byte-identical regardless of DB row order (#3298) — S, depends on C-004
